import os
import pickle
from pathlib import Path

def main():
    ckpt_dir = Path("checkpoints/baseline")
    ckpt_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    model = {
        "type": "heuristic_utility_over_dist",
        "description": "Global heuristic: selects target node maximizing utility / (graph_dist + 1), moves along shortest path using BFS on exploration graph. COMPLETE robust predict.py with full config handling, per-episode try/except, exact JSON contract, per_type stats.",
        "version": "v3_complete_robust"
    }
    with open(ckpt_dir / "model.pkl", "wb") as f:
        pickle.dump(model, f)
    print("Saved improved heuristic model to", ckpt_dir)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
